title: Israel Shuts Down Natural Gas Fields as Iran Attack Unfolds
description: Israel ordered the temporary shutdown of some natural gas fields after launching an attack on Iran in a joint operation with the US.
content: Israel ordered the temporary shutdown of some natural gas fields after launching an attack on Iran in a joint operation with the US.
